# llms.txt — EGOS Framework
> AI/LLM discovery file for search engines and AI crawlers
> https://llmstxt.org/

## About

EGOS is an orchestration kernel for governed AI agents, providing:
- **Adaptive Atomic Retrieval (AAR)**: Semantic search + atomization
- **Integration Adapters**: Slack, Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, GitHub
- **ATRiAN Ethics**: Truth layer for AI outputs
- **Multi-LLM Provider**: Alibaba Qwen, Gemini, OpenRouter
- **Brazilian LGPD Compliance**: PII detection, pseudonymization

## Endpoints

### API
- Base: https://api.egos.ia.br/v1
- Health: https://api.egos.ia.br/health
- Docs: https://docs.egos.ia.br/api

### Core Services
- Guard Brasil: https://guard.egos.ia.br — PII detection API
- 852 Inteligência: https://852.egos.ia.br — Police intelligence chatbot

## Quick Start

```bash
# Install CLI
npm install -g @egos/cli

# Run agent
egos run drift-sentinel --dry

# Check governance
bun run governance:check
```

## Capabilities

- [search] Semantic document search with scoring
- [agents] 17+ autonomous agents for code, security, audit
- [integrations] Webhook, messaging, GitHub adapters
- [compliance] LGPD, RIPA, ATRiAN ethical validation

## Models

| Provider | Models | Cost |
|----------|--------|------|
| Alibaba | qwen-plus, qwen-max, qwen-coder | Free tier |
| OpenRouter | gemini-2.0-flash, deepseek | Pay-per-use |
| Claude | opus, sonnet, haiku | Unlimited (IDE) |

- Architecture: docs/SYSTEM_MAP.md

- Agents: AGENTS.md
- Compliance: docs/compliance/LGPD.md
